response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep developer-tooling and testing-infrastructure experience (test runners, assertion libraries, CI/CD setup, Selenium training) and some mobile background, which aligns well with the role's technical focus. However, this is a Level II people-management position requiring at least 2 years of people management and 3 years of technical leadership, and the resume shows an entirely IC-track career with no direct reports, no formal team leadership, and no organizational-change experience. The technical fit is real, but the core management requirements are unmet.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and test-infrastructure experience (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/GitLab/dev-ops setup, Selenium courses)
18+ years of broad software development experience across web, mobile, and low-latency backend systems
Strong mentorship and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, coding dojos, conference talks)
concerns: No formal people-management experience (role requires 2+ years managing engineers)
No demonstrated experience leading organizational change or setting team roadmaps at org level
Mobile-platform experience is limited and dated (iOS/Apple TV work ended in 2016)

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test automation depth
Long IC tenure without technical leadership titles
